summary_one_line: Input must carry a valid sbix table directory whose has_data() check passes, requiring the literal 'sbix' tag and a non-empty sbix structure.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A font blob containing the 4-byte table tag 'sbix' (0x73 0x62 0x69 0x78) in the table directory plus an sbix table whose has_data() returns true, so the true side of `if (font->face->table.sbix->has_data ())` is taken.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds (value_profile_cmplog) contain the ASCII bytes 73 62 69 78 ('sbix') at offsets 0x0c-0x0f, immediately after the SFNT header, and the per-role overlay marks line 354 (the sbix reference_png body) as winner-only [W], with W taking the true side (T=6 F=0) at the blocker.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds (naive / value_profile) lack the 'sbix' tag at offsets 0x0c-0x0f (e.g. they carry 00/20/2c bytes instead of 73 62 69 78), so has_data() returns false and they take the false side (T=0 F=20) at the blocker, never reaching line 354.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: cmplog/vpc's I2SRandReplace reads the CmpLogObserver buffer after a memcmp/table-tag comparison against the constant 'sbix', finds the operand in the input, and substitutes the matching 4-byte tag at the table-directory offset; naive and value_profile have no I2S stage and must blindly havoc-mutate the exact 4-byte tag, which they fail to do in 10 trials.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of an sbix has_data() check in hb_ot_color_glyph_reference_png.
Both decisive pairs differ by the I2S technique and the winner is the cmplog-family fuzzer.
The second decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog over value_profile, also an I2S delta.
Winner-resolving seeds contain the ASCII 'sbix' tag in the table directory.
At the blocker, the winner seed set takes the true side and the loser set takes the false side.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 353  T=6 F=0  T=0 F=20  if (font->face->table.sbix->has_data ())  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: Line 354 (the sbix reference_png body) is hit only by the winner-resolving seed set.
evidence_trail.exact_quote: [W]   354      blob = font->face->table.sbix->reference_png (font, glyph, nullptr, nullptr, nullptr);

evidence_trail.claim: At offsets 0x0c-0x0f the winner bytes are concentrated 's','b','i','x' while loser bytes differ.
cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator that substitutes a CMP operand at matching input offsets.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
scans the input for byte sequences matching one
operand, and substitutes the other operand at those offsets.

evidence_trail.claim: naive and value_profile have no I2SRandReplace stage.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5438 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed e157098e95bbf655` and observed one I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 17 of the 18-level ancestor chain, confirming an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in the vpc winner's lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on a 4-byte exact-match table tag where naive resolves the branch at the same rate as cmplog within the trial budget, showing havoc alone reaches the tag and I2S is not the differentiator.

weakest_evidence_point: The exact comparison form behind has_data() (a memcmp on the table tag vs. an offset/length check) is inferred from the seed bytes and source, not directly observed in a CMP trace.
